title: Ukrainian Caramel Cobbler Cookies
description: A sweet Ukrainian-inspired dessert combining crunchy cookies with a gooey caramel cobbler topping.
instructions: Crush the Ukrainian cookies into fine crumbs.
In a large bowl, combine the cookie crumbs, flour, sugar, and salt.
Add in the unsalted butter and mix until well combined.
Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9x9-inch baking dish.
While the crust is baking, mix together the caramel, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Pour the caramel mixture over the baked crust.
Bake for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the caramel is bubbly and golden brown.
